---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the search API or scraper
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
Clear description of what's wrong.

## Reproduction
```bash
curl "http://localhost:10080/search?q=test"
```

## Expected behavior
What should happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happens (include response, errors, logs).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS]
- Binary version: [e.g. v0.1.0-alpha.1]
- Engine affected: [Brave / Yahoo / DuckDuckGo]

## Logs
```
# pm2 logs or server output
```
